name: @geist-nuxt/kit-api-docs
description: API docs kit. Distribution unit is the SLICE: when copying a component into a consuming project, copy every file listed in its `files` array to its `target` (components -> app/components/api-docs/, composables -> app/composables/). Keeping the api-docs/ directory gives every component the ApiDocs* prefix (pathPrefix:true) and isolates it from the consumer's own components. `coreDeps` are satisfied automatically by extending @geist-nuxt/core. Dependency rules: kit -> own files (declared in slice) and kit -> core only; kit -> kit is forbidden — shared logic moves up to core.

items.name: code-block
items.title: ApiDocsCodeBlock
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code block with copy button and soft-wrap toggle.

items.name: request-example
items.title: ApiDocsRequestExample
items.description: Multi-language request sample panel for API endpoint docs.

items.description: Response payload panel (status variants) for API endpoint docs.
